title: The overflow anchoring ceremony
subtitle: A ten-minute ritual for releasing financial fear and anchoring constant overflow, expansion, and security.
excerpt: A closing ritual from Week 6 of the MONEY program. The ceremony moves through three stages: release all fear of depletion and instability, allow constant overflow and security, then anchor the feeling as permanent.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 6 Overflow Anchoring Ceremony in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A closing ritual from Week 6 of the MONEY program. Three stages: release fear of loss and instability, allow overflow and security, then anchor the feeling as the new permanent state.
New to rituals as a practice? Read

Stand or sit in a quiet place. Close your eyes. Take three slow breaths. Picture yourself standing under a waterfall of golden light. The light falls through the crown of the head, down through the body, through the soles of the feet, and into the ground. Everything it touches becomes clean. Stand in it for a minute until you feel ready.
Speak or read the release statement three times. On each repetition, feel the words landing in the body rather than just passing through the mind.

attrs.quote: I am ready to release all fear of depletion, loss, or instability in my finances. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

content.text: Speak or read the allow statement three times. Let the golden light fill the space that the release just cleared.

attrs.quote: I am ready to align to and allow constant overflow, expansion, and security with money. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

content.text: Take one slow breath. Picture an internal container somewhere in the centre of the body. The golden light fills it. The container does not overflow or run dry. It holds exactly what it needs and is replenished as soon as anything leaves. The light that fills it is the same light that fills the waterfall: constant, inexhaustible, always arriving.
Hold this image for two minutes. Then open your eyes.

attrs.quote: This week, I am grateful that overflow feels calm, natural, and permanent in my life.

content.text: Adapted from the Week 6 Overflow Anchoring Ceremony in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
